category_descriptions.maestro: Intelligent coordinator and core workflow commands — init, plan, execute, verify, and lifecycle management
category_descriptions.spec: Project specifications, conventions, and codebase knowledge management
category_descriptions.quality: Testing, debugging, code review, refactoring, and quality assurance
category_descriptions.manage: Project status, memory management, codebase documentation, and issue tracking
category_descriptions.team: Multi-agent team collaboration skills for orchestrated parallel workflows
category_descriptions.learn: Pattern extraction, guided reading, investigation, retrospectives, and multi-perspective analysis
category_descriptions.wiki: Knowledge graph management, connection discovery, and digest generation

landing.title: Maestro Documentation
landing.description: Complete documentation for Maestro commands, skills, and workflows.
landing.quick_guide_step1: Start with /maestro-brainstorm to explore ideas, or /maestro-init to initialize a project
landing.quick_guide_step2: Create a roadmap with /maestro-roadmap, or generate full specs with /maestro-spec-generate
landing.quick_guide_step3: Plan tasks with /maestro-plan, execute with /maestro-execute, then verify with /maestro-verify
landing.quick_guide_step4: Use /learn-* commands for continuous learning and /wiki-* commands to manage your knowledge graph
